theme.name: Arena Ruins
theme.visualIdentity: ancient ruined arena with weathered stone, restrained moss, warm neutral highlights, cool shadow separation, readable tactical board

boardSurface.contrastRule: grid remains readable under Archer, Slime and Golem at reduced mobile size

arenaBorder.style: broken ancient masonry with low-profile ruins
arenaBorder.heightRule: must not obscure front or side board cells
arenaBorder.safeZone: outside playable grid and pointer interaction area

background.style: ruined amphitheatre depth with distant arches and collapsed walls
background.priority: support silhouettes, never compete with units or HUD

rules: drop before combat VFX under load
Archer silhouette must separate from background
Slime must not disappear into floor hue
Golem must remain readable without flattening stone material

hero.archer.readability: olive-green silhouette must contrast with arena stone

monster.slime.readability: body color must remain distinct from moss and ground VFX

monster.golem.readability: largest pilot; must not blend into arena border or background masonry

mobileBudget.texturePolicy: reuse and atlas where practical; no per-frame loading
mobileBudget.ambientPolicy: secondary ambient particles are first to degrade

orientationAcceptance: portrait responsive layout keeps all playable cells visible
fullscreen preserves camera framing and does not stretch units
props remain outside tactical and touch zones
